display.name: Carry the Forge Parcel
display.short_description: A wrapped parcel of forge parts needs a careful hand through the stage before the wagon road closes.

rules.briefing_text: Carry the forge parcel to the marked stop. It crowds the backpack until delivery, but the hamlet will pay for the trouble.
rules.accepted_text: The marked stop can take the parcel now. Deliver it intact, then return here for payment.
rules.completed_text: The forge parcel made it through. Choose one hamlet reward before you move on.
rules.claimed_text: The forge parcel is already delivered. This request is settled.
